text: Here are results from the current image-to-skin model.

text: The input can be a photo portrait, an anime drawing, an oil painting, a stylized character, a person, or even an animal.Each pair shows the same idea: reference image in, generated Minecraft skin out.

text: Finally, make it work on the Minecraft character model.
